name_it: Saints Charles Lwanga and companions, martyrs
name_en: Saints Charles Lwanga and companions, martyrs
name_es: Saints Charles Lwanga and companions, martyrs
name_pt: Saints Charles Lwanga and companions, martyrs
bio_en: Charles Lwanga was a Ugandan convert to the Catholic Church who was martyred with his companions and is revered as a saint by both the Catholic Church and the Anglican Communion.
bio_it: Charles Lwanga was a Ugandan convert to the Catholic Church who was martyred with his companions and is revered as a saint by both the Catholic Church and the Anglican Communion.
bio_es: San Carlos Lwanga o Luanga, también conocido como Carl Lwanga, Charles Lwanga o Karoli Lwanga fue un catequista católico de Uganda mártir por su fe y venerado como santo en la Iglesia católica. Había nacido en el reino de Buganda, en la parte sur de la moderna Uganda, y sirvió como paje en la corte del rey Mwanga II.
bio_pt: Carlos Luanga foi um dos mártires a serem mortos a mando do cabaca Muanga II (r. 1884–1888) do Reino de Buganda, na atual Uganda.
